---
title: 'The demographic history of the wood frog <br> (project update)'
institute: "<br>Yale School of the Environment<br>Yale Institute for Biospheric Studies<br>New Haven, Connecticut"
format: 
  revealjs:
    chalkboard: true
    incremental: true
    logo: imgs/yale-logo.png
    footer: "🔗 [https://dylanpadilla.netlify.app/](https://dylanpadilla.netlify.app/)"
    slide-number: true
    theme: [simple, assets/monash.scss]
    show-slide-number: all
    controls: true
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    css: [assets/syntax-highlight.css, assets/custom.css, assets/pacman.css]
    header-includes: |
      <link rel="stylesheet" href="">
execute:
  echo: true
---


# []{style="font-family:Calibri;font-weight:normal;color:purple"} {background=''}

<center>
![](imgs/Darwin.jpg){width=80%}
</center>

# [SNPs under selection?]{style="font-family:Lato;font-weight:normal;color:purple;font-size:50px"} {background=''}

<center>

<img src = "imgs/exciting.gif" width=900px height=600px/>

</center>

# [Mechanisms of Evolution]{style="font-family:Lato;font-weight:normal;color:purple;font-size:50px"} {background=''}

<br>

::::{.columns}

:::{.column width="50%"}


<center>
<img src = "imgs/mechanisms.jpeg"  width = "600px" height = "430px" />
</center>


:::


:::{.column width="50%"}


:::

::::

# [Mechanisms of Evolution]{style="font-family:Lato;font-weight:normal;color:purple;font-size:50px"} {background=''}

<br>

::::{.columns}

:::{.column width="50%"}


<center>
<img src = "imgs/mechanisms.jpeg"  width = "600px" height = "430px" />
</center>


:::


:::{.column width="50%"}


<center>
<img src = "imgs/pop-gen-environment.png"  width = "450px" height = "430px" />
</center>


:::

::::


#

![](imgs/effective-pop-size.png)


# [What is demographic history?]{style="font-family:Lato;font-weight:normal;color:purple;font-size:50px"} {background=''}

<br>

In population genetics, demographic history refers to reconstructing a population's past changes in *size*, structure, and migration patterns using genetic data, revealing events like expansions, contractions, bottlenecks, or gene flow that shape current genetic diversity and evolutionary forces like selection


#

<center>
<img src = "imgs/admixture-map.png" width=870px height=570px />
</center>

#

<center>
<img src = "imgs/aRanSyl_structure.png" width=750px height=750px />
</center>

#

<center>
<img src = "imgs/demo_model.png" width=720px height=720px />
</center>


#

<center>
<img src = "imgs/Ne_GO.png" width=720px height=720px />
</center>


#

<center>
<img src = "imgs/aRanSyl_adaptive_snps.png" width=720px height=720px />
</center>
